response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song '暁闇エクスデス'. I noted the JSON performer list omits Kazama Iroha, though she is present and performing. The video includes the full song performance followed by a major live concert announcement and a celebratory talk segment. Subtitles follow the on-screen text for the announcement and transcribe the spoken dialogue with precise timing. All timestamps are tightly wrapped to the audio vocalizations and visual cues, ensuring no bleed-over into pauses.

subtitles.original: 「我らエデンの星を統べる者、秘密結社…」
subtitles.english: "We who rule the stars of Eden, Secret Society..."

subtitles.original: 「holoX!!」
subtitles.english: "holoX!!"

subtitles.original: (で、ござる～!)
subtitles.english: (De gozaru~!)

subtitles.original: 「機は熟した! 暁闇より現れし英霊たちよ、
subtitles.english: "The time is ripe! Spirits from the dawn darkness,

subtitles.original: 準備はいいか!!」
subtitles.english: are you ready!!"

subtitles.original: 「おー!」
subtitles.english: "Oh!"

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: ラッパッパー LaPaLaPa ラッパッパー LaPaTa LaPaTa ラッパッパー
subtitles.english: Rappappa LaPaLaPa Rappappa LaPaTa LaPaTa Rappappa

subtitles.original: 夜が深まる ほらダークネス
subtitles.english: When the night deepens, behold darkness.

subtitles.original: 能あるタカはPONで隠す
subtitles.english: A clever hawk hides its talent with a 'PON'.

subtitles.original: 何に従え エゴイスト
subtitles.english: Follow whatever you want, egoist.

subtitles.original: ノートにニンニン サムライガール
subtitles.english: Writing 'Ninnin' in the notebook, Samurai Girl.

subtitles.original: やる気しないけど フルベッドでしょ チェキチェキ
subtitles.english: Not feeling it, but going all in, right? Check-check!

subtitles.original: 征服すればおｋ 切り裂く赤字 ジャキンジャキン
subtitles.english: Conquer and it's OK. Slashing red ink, Jakkin-jakkin!

subtitles.original: 悪の手のひら 踊りたくなる
subtitles.english: Makes you want to dance in the palm of evil.

subtitles.original: ほら君 気付けば ノリノリです
subtitles.english: Look, you're in the groove before you know it.

subtitles.original: どうしようもない Don't, No Mine
subtitles.english: There's nothing I can do. Don't, No Mine.

subtitles.original: 堕ちてく運命
subtitles.english: Falling fate.

subtitles.original: ならしょうがない
subtitles.english: Then it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: もう全部 塗り替えよう
subtitles.english: Let's repaint it all.

subtitles.english: Where X and X and X and X intersect in the middle,

subtitles.original: アウンコクの エクスデス
subtitles.english: Aun-un-koku-no-X-Death.

subtitles.original: 「混沌としたこの世界を 我らholoX色に 塗り替えるのだ!
subtitles.english: "We will repaint this chaotic world into our color!

subtitles.original: 皆の者、かかれ!!」

subtitles.english: "Yes My Dark!!!"

subtitles.english: "The stars of Eden are in my hands!"

subtitles.original: 「疾風木枯斬り!」
subtitles.english: "Gale Withered-Tree Slash!"

subtitles.original: 「一刀両断、叩き切れ!」
subtitles.english: "Cut them down in a single stroke!"

subtitles.english: PIA ARENA MM

subtitles.original: 秘密結社holoX 第一回全体ライブ「FIRST MISSION」開催決定!!

subtitles.english: Are you ready to take the world?

subtitles.original: 狂気ノ宴ノハジマリダ
subtitles.english: The beginning of the mad banquet.

subtitles.original: #SSholoX世界リペイント計画
subtitles.english: #SSholoXWorldRepaintProject

subtitles.original: やったー！すげぇー！信じられない！
subtitles.english: We did it! This is amazing! I can't believe it!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: 皆も驚いてくれてる！やったー！
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: Everyone is surprised too! We did it!

subtitles.original: Hakui Koyori: いかがでしたかー！？
subtitles.english: Hakui Koyori: How was it?!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: ヤバいね！
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: This is crazy!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: まだ早いからね！ヤバいねー！
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: It's still early though! So crazy!

subtitles.original: La+ Darknesss: ということで、なんと我々の現地ライブが決まりました！
subtitles.english: La+ Darknesss: And so, our in-person live concert has finally been decided!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: ありがとうございます！やったー！
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: Thank you very much! We did it!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: 「FIRST MISSION」や！PIA ARENA MM！
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: It's "FIRST MISSION"! At PIA ARENA MM!

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: ということで皆それぞれね、感想と...
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: So, I'd like each of you to share your thoughts...

subtitles.original: Takane Lui: ライブに向けた抱負をお願いしたいと思います。
subtitles.english: Takane Lui: ...and your aspirations for the live concert.
